message:
refactor(cli): Consolidate atomic file writes into shared utility

Extracts duplicated atomic write logic into reusable functions in
packages/cli/src/lib/utils.ts. This prevents file corruption if the
process crashes mid-write by using a temp-file + rename pattern.

New utilities:
- atomicWriteFileSync: Synchronous atomic write with auto-cleanup
- atomicWriteFile: Async version of the same

Updated consumers:
- config.ts: Uses atomicWriteFileSync, removes inline implementation
- credentials.ts: Uses atomicWriteFileSync for token storage
- registry-loader.ts: Uses atomicWriteFile for cache writes
- sync.ts: Uses atomic write utilities

Also includes minor type fix in apps/web/src/lib/utils.ts for better
error handling compatibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
